ddls:
CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was published */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "text" TEXT /* Full text of the article */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment of the article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the article */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the news event */,
  "read_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been read */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the article has been shared */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags */,
  "is_breaking" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is breaking news */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance of the article to the financial market */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment type */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment type (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment type */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the source */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the source */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Market Updates, Company News) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles_instruments" (
  "article_instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article-instrument relationship */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument mentioned in the article */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Relevance of the instrument to the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_instruments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_instruments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., Stock, ETF, Bond) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the instrument */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last known price of the instrument */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Change in price since the last update */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions as a JSON array */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for triggering the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for generating the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_alerts" (
  "user_alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-alert relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reports" (
  "user_report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-report relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
